Button.description: A call-to-action button supporting primary/secondary styles and surfaces.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

width.description: Fixed width as a CSS value.

href.description: Renders the button as an anchor when set.

TextLink.description: An inline or standalone text hyperlink.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

TextLinkCaret.description: A text link with a leading or trailing caret icon.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

ButtonGroup.description: Lays out a set of buttons / links with shared alignment and sizing.

buttonWidth.description: Fixed width applied to each button.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

Text.description: Typographic text supporting body, title and feature scales.

size.description: Size within the scale (availability varies by kind).

primitive.description: HTML element used to render the text.

Caret.description: A chevron/caret icon that inherits the surrounding text colour.

DirectionalIcon.description: A trailing affordance icon: right-arrow or external-link.

size.description: Icon size (px number or CSS size).

Tooltip.description: A small, accessible info tooltip revealed on hover/focus.

children.description: Rich tooltip content (takes precedence over title).

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

Badge.description: A small label/pill, optionally with a tooltip.

backgroundColor.description: Predefined colour token (or any CSS colour).

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

numberOfLines.description: Clamp the content to N lines.

maxWidth.description: Maximum width as a CSS value.

BadgeIndicator.description: A dot (simple) or numbered notification indicator.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

showBorder.description: Shows a border ring around the container.

showDot.description: Shows the dot when kind is simple.

backgroundColor.description: Colour token or custom CSS colour.

dotSize.description: Dot size when kind is simple.

Image.description: A token-aware image wrapper with sizing, radius and border.

TileContainer.description: A surface container for grouping content; interactive when href/onClick is set.

background.description: Surface token, image URL, or CSS colour.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

padding.description: Inside padding (space token or CSS value).

showBorder.description: Draws a border around the tile.

borderRadius.description: Corner radius preset or CSS value.

aspectRatio.description: Aspect ratio when height is not set.

elementSurface.description: Surface context for child colours on custom backgrounds.

TitleLockup.description: Composes eyebrow, title and subtitle with responsive size cascade.

children.description: Declarative children when not using object props.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

viewport.description: Force a viewport for responsive sizing.

TitleLockupTitle.description: The title element of a TitleLockup.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

isStandAlone.description: Disables the bottom margin when there is no subtitle.

TitleLockupSubtitle.description: The subtitle element of a TitleLockup.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

TitleLockupEyebrow.description: The eyebrow element of a TitleLockup.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

ScreenReaderText.description: Text hidden visually but announced by screen readers.

Tilelet.description: A content tile composed from TileContainer, TitleLockup, Badge and Image.

badge.description: Badge config shown at the top.

imagePosition.description: Image vertical position relative to text.

renderDescriptiveIcon.description: Exposes the directional icon to assistive tech.

iconMarginTop.description: Top margin for the icon container.

textWidth.description: Width of the text content area.

background.description: Surface token, image URL, or CSS colour.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

borderRadius.description: Corner radius preset or CSS value.

weight.description: The relative weight of this component within a Row or Column, similar to CSS 'flex-grow'.

surface.description: The surface the component is placed on; drives token colours.

width.description: Fixed width as a CSS value.

href.description: Renders the button as an anchor when set.

ButtonGroupItem.description: A single entry in ButtonGroup.items, discriminated by `kind`: primary/secondary render a Button, textLink a TextLink, textLinkCaret a TextLinkCaret.

kind.description: Renders a Button of this kind.

href.description: Renders the button as a link when set.
